title: Crumble Sugar Cookies
description: A classic sweet treat with crumbly texture and a hint of sugar. Perfect for a snack or dessert.
instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
In a bowl, mix together the sugar and crumble.
Roll out the mixture into small balls and place on the baking sheet.
Bake for 12-15 minutes or until lightly golden.
Remove from the oven and let cool on the baking sheet for 5 minutes.
Transfer to a wire rack to cool completely.
